ddls:
CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the submission */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the submission belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry associated with the submission */,
  "time_created" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the submission was created */,
  "time_modified" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the submission was last modified */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the submission has been approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the submission */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the submission was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the submission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., submitter, approver, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "data_content" TEXT /* The actual content of the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission associated with the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_workflow" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission in the workflow */,
  "current_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the approval process */,
  "next_stage" TEXT /* Next stage of the approval process */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the approver responsible for the current stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_workflow_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the action was taken on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the notification is about */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the changes were made to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the changes were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_history_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the comment was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_comments_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the review was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the review was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the category is associated with */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the setting belongs to */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event that triggers the notification */,
  "notify" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user wants to receive notifications for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the analytic data is for */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event being tracked (e.g., submission rate, approval rate) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the analytic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the action was taken on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
